steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the table
steps.content: Treat the number of cars $c$ as $x$ and the maximum number of people $p$ as $y$. Enter the table as $x_1=[3,5,10]$ and $y_1=[9,11,16]$, then type $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=1$ and $b=6$, so the relationship is $p=c+6$.

steps.title: Match the answer form
steps.content: The choices are written with $c$ and $p$. From $p=c+6$, subtract $p$ and 6 from both sides to get $c-p=-6$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
